title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
